package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for root_main_go_in_layered_service_repo: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layered service repos that keep the primary binary at repository-root `main.go` instead of `cmd/<name>/main.go`.
type CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoModel
}

type CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoService struct {
    repo *CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepo(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoDTO) error {

    log.Println("starting server...")
    router := gin.Default()
    db, err := gorm.Open(nil)
    if err != nil {
        log.Fatalf("failed to connect: %v", err)
    }
    repo := &CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    svc := &CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoService{repo: repo, client: client}
    router.GET("/api/users", func(c *gin.Context) {
        var model CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoModel
        if err := svc.repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", c.Query("id")).First(&model).Error; err != nil {
            c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "not found"})
            return
        }
        c.JSON(http.StatusOK, model)
    })
    _ = router
    _ = svc
    _ = err
    return nil
}
